creator: michael.adm@gmail.com
text:
Mellanox ConnectX-4 Lx
HPE Ethernet 10/25Gb 2-port 640FLR-SFP28 Adapter
  Firmware Version 14.26.1040, Driver Version 2.30.21713.0

mlx5en: Mellanox Ethernet driver 3.5.2 (September 2019)

Errors are:
 mlx5_core0: ERR: mlx5_init_once:918:(pid 0): Unable to find vendor specific capabilities
 mlx5_core0: WARN: mlx5_fwdump_prep:76:(pid 0): Failed to find vendor-specific capability, error 2
 hn0: mce0 SIOCGRSSKEY failed: 22

While in test mode, the work of the network card is not suspicious, but maybe there are some pitfalls?
Is it possible to put this network card in a production server under high load with such error messages?

Hyper-V 2019 server; VM - FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT

root@frw02:~# pciconf -lv | grep mlx -C 10
mlx5_core0@pci1:0:2:0:  class=0x020000 rev=0x80 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x15b3 device=0x1016 subvendor=0x1590 subdevice=0x00d3
    vendor     = 'Mellanox Technologies'
    device     = 'MT27710 Family [ConnectX-4 Lx Virtual Function]'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet
